first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is thematically the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills or experience. There is no language that suggests the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco influenced the evaluation.
